revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.text:
{{helpbox |templatename = Wikitext navbox |name = [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] |bodyclass = plainlist
|list1 = *[[Help:Cheatsheet|Cheatsheet]] *[[Help:Wikitext|All wikitext]] *[[Help:Sound file markup|Sound files]] *[[Help:Visual file markup|Visual files]] *[[Help:Table|Tables]] *[[Help:Template|Templates]] [[Help:A quick guide to templates|(quick guide)]] *[[Help:HTML in wikitext|Using HTML codes within wikitext]] *[[Help:Pipe trick|Pipe trick]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{helpbox |templatename = Wikitext navbox |name = [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] |bodyclass = plainlist
|list1 = *[[Help:Cheatsheet|Cheatsheet]] *[[Help:Wikitext|All wikitext]] *[[Help:Sound file markup|Sound files]] *[[Help:Visual file markup|Visual files]] *[[Help:Table|Tables]] *[[Help:Template|Templates]] [[Help:A quick guide to templates|(quick guide)]] *[[Help:HTML in wikitext|Using HTML codes within wikitext]] *[[Help:Pipe trick|Pipe trick]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
